summary: The diff implements a 'Position Holes' button in App.tsx that opens HolePositioningEditor in a Dialog modal, wired to useOcarinaPhoto, useCustomHolePositions, and useModelRotation. REQ-49, REQ-50, and REQ-51 appear largely addressed. However, a hallucinated feature (model rotation controls) is included in the HolePositioningEditor and App.tsx that was not requested. The core requirements around the button, modal overlay, background image, draggable holes, Save/Cancel, and useCustomHolePositions as source of truth all appear implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: A new useModelRotation hook was added and model rotation (0/90/180/270 degree) controls were integrated into the HolePositioningEditor and App.tsx, including a 'Position Holes & Rotation' button label and rotation UI.
hallucinated_features.reason: None of the requirements (REQ-49, REQ-50, REQ-51) mention model rotation. The build request explicitly states non-goals include 'Adding new hole positioning features beyond drag-and-drop repositioning.' Rotation of the ocarina model is a new feature not requested.
